title: [codereview-pass3] Kconfig: new DEADDROP option should depend on LICHEN_DTN_STORAGE if it exists; also update default in board configs not done yet. Robustness pass.
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/Kconfig:1-270 - Third review pass. No DTN storage module yet, so dependency chain incomplete. Will cause build failures in puck app until CMake and board confs updated. P2 robustness. Discovered-from:project-LICHEN-2h1i.2.4.2
